mapper.sql: su.user_id, su.dept_id, su.user_name, su.nick_name, su.email, su.phonenumber, su.sex, su.avatar, su.password, su.status, su.del_flag, su.login_ip, su.login_date, su.create_by, su.create_time, su.update_by, su.update_time, su.remark, su.first_login, su.org_id, su.approve_login

su.user_id, su.dept_id, su.user_name, su.nick_name, su.email, su.phonenumber, su.sex, su.avatar, su.password, su.status, su.del_flag, su.login_ip, su.login_date, su.create_by, su.create_time, su.update_by, su.update_time, su.remark, su.first_login, suo.org_id as org_id, su.approve_login, so.org_name
mapper.select:
select
from sys_user su where su.del_flag = '0' and su.status = '0' and (su.phonenumber != '' and su.phonenumber is not null) and exists(select 1 from sys_user_dept where sys_user_dept.user_id = su.user_id)

SELECT , sr.id as rank_id, sr.rank_name FROM sys_user su JOIN sys_user_org suo on su.user_id = suo.user_id AND suo.org_id = #{orgId} JOIN sys_org so on suo.org_id = so.org_id LEFT JOIN sys_user_rank sur on su.user_id = sur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_rank sr on sur.rank_id = sr.id AND sr.org_id = #{orgId} WHERE su.del_flag = '0'
AND su.nick_name like concat('%', #{nickName}, '%')
AND su.user_name like concat('%', #{userName}, '%')
AND su.status = #{status}
AND su.phonenumber like concat('%', #{phonenumber}, '%')
AND su.create_time >= #{params.beginTime}
AND su.create_time < date_add(#{params.endTime}, interval 1 day)
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys_user_dept sud JOIN sys_dept sd on sud.dept_id = sd.dept_id WHERE su.user_id = sud.user_id AND ( sd.dept_id = #{deptId} OR sd.dept_id IN ( SELECT t.dept_id FROM sys_dept t WHERE CONCAT(',', t.ancestors, ',') LIKE CONCAT('%,', #{deptId}, ',%') ) ) )

SELECT so.org_name, sr.id as rank_id, sr.rank_name,
FROM sys_user_dept sud LEFT JOIN sys_user_role sur on sud.user_id = sur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_user as su on su.user_id = sur.user_id JOIN sys_user_org suo on su.user_id = suo.user_id AND suo.org_id = #{orgId} JOIN sys_org so on suo.org_id = so.org_id LEFT JOIN sys_user_rank sura on su.user_id = sura.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_rank sr on sura.rank_id = sr.id AND sr.org_id = #{orgId} WHERE sud.dept_id = #{deptId} and sur.role_id = #{roleId} and su.user_id is not null and su.del_flag = 0

select u.user_id, u.dept_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name, u.email, u.phonenumber, u.status, u.create_time from sys_user u left join sys_dept d on u.dept_id = d.dept_id join sys_user_role ur on u.user_id = ur.user_id and ur.role_id = #{roleId} where u.del_flag = '0'
AND u.user_name like concat('%', #{userName}, '%')
AND u.phonenumber like concat('%', #{phonenumber}, '%')
${params.dataScope}

select u.user_id, u.dept_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name, u.email, u.phonenumber, u.status, u.create_time from sys_user u left join sys_dept d on u.dept_id = d.dept_id join sys_user_org suo on u.user_id = suo.user_id and suo.org_id = #{orgId} where u.del_flag = '0' and u.user_id not in (select sur.user_id from sys_user_role sur where sur.role_id = #{roleId})
AND u.nick_name like concat('%', #{nickName}, '%')
AND u.phonenumber like concat('%', #{phonenumber}, '%')
${params.dataScope}

select
from sys_user su join sys_user_org suo on su.user_id = suo.user_id and suo.is_default = 1 join sys_org so on suo.org_id = so.org_id where su.user_name = #{userName}

select
from sys_user su join sys_user_org suo on su.user_id = suo.user_id and suo.is_default = 1 join sys_org so on suo.org_id = so.org_id WHERE su.user_id = #{userId}
select count(1) from sys_user where user_name = #{userName} limit 1
select user_id, phonenumber from sys_user where phonenumber = #{phonenumber} limit 1
select user_id, email from sys_user where email = #{email} limit 1
mapper.update: update sys_user set password = #{password}, first_login = '0' where user_name = #{userName}
mapper.delete:
update sys_user set del_flag = '2' where user_id in
#{userId}
mapper.select:
SELECT su.user_id, su.user_name, su.nick_name, su.email, su.phonenumber, su.status, su.create_time FROM sys_user su JOIN sys_user_org suo on su.user_id = suo.user_id and suo.enabled = 1 WHERE suo.org_id = ( select org_id from sys_post where post_id = #{postId} ) AND su.user_id not in ( select sup.user_id from sys_user_post sup where sup.post_id = #{postId} )
AND su.user_name like concat('%', #{param.userName}, '%')
AND su.phonenumber like concat('%', #{param.phonenumber}, '%')

SELECT su.user_id, su.user_name, su.nick_name, su.email, su.phonenumber, su.status, su.create_time FROM sys_user su
AND su.user_name like concat('%', #{param.userName}, '%')
AND su.phonenumber like concat('%', #{param.phonenumber}, '%')
AND su.user_id not in ( SELECT srgo.re_object_id as id from sys_receive_group_object srgo left join sys_receive_group srg on srg.id = srgo.re_group_id and srg.re_mode = 'USER_GROUP' where srgo.re_group_id = #{param.reGroupId} )

select
from sys_user su where su.user_name in
#{userName}
and su.del_flag = 0 and su.status = 0

select
from sys_user su where su.user_id in
#{userId}
and su.status = '0' and su.del_flag = '0'

select distinct
from sys_dept sd join sys_user_dept sud on sud.dept_id = sd.dept_id join sys_user su on su.user_id = sud.user_id where sd.dept_code = #{deptCode} and su.status = '0' and su.del_flag = '0' order by su.user_name

select
from sys_user su where su.status = '0' and su.del_flag = '0' and su.user_name = #{userName}

WITH target_dept AS (SELECT dept_id FROM sys_dept WHERE dept_id = #{deptId} OR parent_id = #{deptId}) SELECT distinct su.user_name, su.nick_name FROM sys_user su JOIN sys_user_dept sud ON sud.user_id = su.user_id JOIN target_dept td ON td.dept_id = sud.dept_id WHERE su.status = 0 AND su.del_flag = 0 order by su.user_name

SELECT u.user_id, user_name, nick_name, ud.dept_id, d.dept_name FROM sys_user u INNER JOIN sys_user_dept ud ON u.user_id = ud.user_id AND ud.is_default = 1 INNER JOIN sys_dept d ON ud.dept_id = d.dept_id INNER JOIN sys_user_post up ON u.user_id = up.user_id AND up.post_id = 29 WHERE d.dept_id IN (13, 38, 39, 40, 71, 70) AND u.status = '0' AND u.del_flag = '0' order by ud.dept_id
